transcript.content: Please close T-319 by keeping Theo Ward in the standard queue, with a clear reply and record note.

{'customer': 'Theo Ward', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Theo Ward / housing intake call', 'body': 'Theo missed a housing intake call while at a required court check-in. He asks for a second slot today; the intake list is already overbooked.'}

args.body:
Hi Theo,

Thanks for letting us know you missed today's housing intake call due to a required court check-in. Today's intake list is already overbooked, so we aren't able to add a second slot today. We've kept your place in the standard intake queue, and you'll be contacted for the next available slot in the normal rotation — no penalty for the missed call given the documented court conflict.

If your court documentation changes anything about your timing or needs, just reply here and we'll note it on your record.

Best,
Housing Support

Theo Ward missed housing intake call due to required court check-in (documented conflict). Intake list overbooked today; declined same-day re-slot. Kept in standard intake queue for next available slot in normal rotation. No priority bump, no penalty for missed call. Customer notified.

args.resolution: Theo Ward kept in standard housing intake queue after missing call due to court check-in. Same-day re-slot not available (overbooked). Customer informed; memo filed.

args.summary: Replied to Theo Ward explaining no same-day re-slot but kept in standard intake queue with no penalty, filed record memo, and closed T-319.
